title: Handshake vs Closely — Honest Comparison for LinkedIn Automation
description: Comparing Handshake and Closely for LinkedIn automation. See features, pricing, safety, and multi-account capabilities side-by-side to find the right fit for your team.

overview.handshake: Handshake is a LinkedIn automation platform built from the ground up for multi-sender rotation. It lets teams manage unlimited LinkedIn sender accounts from a single dashboard, with built-in warmup scheduling, a unified inbox, and premium residential proxies included in every plan. Handshake's pricing model is based on the number of sender accounts — not per-seat — so your entire team can collaborate without multiplying costs. Plans start at $69/month for 1 sender and scale to enterprise volumes.
overview.competitor: Closely is a LinkedIn automation and prospecting platform that offers cloud-based LinkedIn outreach, a B2B contact database, and email verification. Closely positions itself as an affordable all-in-one prospecting tool with LinkedIn automation starting at $59/month per account. It includes features like automated connection requests, message sequences, profile visits, and a built-in lead finder. Closely also offers a free Chrome extension for basic LinkedIn functionality and an email warmup tool.

featureComparison.handshake: Built-in, core feature — rotate outreach across multiple LinkedIn accounts automatically
featureComparison.competitor: Not available — accounts operate independently, no rotation logic

featureComparison.handshake: Automated LinkedIn warmup with gradual volume ramp-up for new accounts
featureComparison.competitor: Basic warmup available — less granular control over ramp-up schedule

featureComparison.handshake: Not included — integrates with external lead sources
featureComparison.competitor: Built-in database with 130M+ B2B contacts, email finder, and verifier

featureComparison.handshake: Single inbox for all LinkedIn sender accounts — manage every conversation in one place
featureComparison.competitor: Inbox available per account but no true unified inbox across all accounts

featureComparison.handshake: Fully cloud-based with premium residential proxies per account
featureComparison.competitor: Cloud-based execution available on paid plans

featureComparison.handshake: Unlimited team seats on every plan
featureComparison.competitor: Team features available but pricing is per-account

featureComparison.handshake: Multi-step sequences with conditions, A/B testing, and dynamic variables
featureComparison.competitor: Automated sequences with connection requests, messages, profile visits, and follow-ups

featureComparison.handshake: Premium residential proxies included on all plans, human-like sending patterns
featureComparison.competitor: Dedicated proxies on higher plans, basic safety features
Free Chrome extension for basic LinkedIn automation and lead export

sections.handshakeWins: Handshake's core advantages over Closely are multi-sender rotation, safety infrastructure, and team pricing. While Closely treats each LinkedIn account as an independent silo, Handshake distributes prospects across accounts intelligently with built-in deduplication. The premium residential proxies on Handshake are a safety tier above Closely's proxy offering. For teams, the pricing gap widens as you scale — 10 senders on Handshake is $299/mo vs $590/mo on Closely, and Handshake includes unlimited team seats while Closely charges per user. The unified inbox across all sender accounts is a genuine productivity advantage for teams managing multiple accounts.
sections.competitorWins: Closely's built-in B2B database with 130M+ contacts is a significant advantage if you don't already have a lead data provider. Being able to find prospects, verify emails, and launch LinkedIn campaigns from a single tool simplifies the workflow. The email warmup tool is useful for teams running both LinkedIn and email outreach. The free Chrome extension offers a low-barrier entry point for individuals who want basic LinkedIn automation before committing to a paid tool. For budget-conscious solo users, Closely's $59/mo starting price for a single account is attractive.
sections.whoShouldChooseHandshake: Choose Handshake if you're running multi-sender LinkedIn outreach and need rotation, safety, and team collaboration at scale. Handshake is the right choice for teams managing 3+ LinkedIn accounts, agencies with client campaigns, and anyone who prioritizes LinkedIn account safety with premium residential proxies.
sections.whoShouldChooseCompetitor: Choose Closely if you want a single platform for LinkedIn prospecting with a built-in lead database. It's well-suited for solo operators who need affordable LinkedIn automation plus email verification, or for teams that want to combine LinkedIn automation with email warmup in one tool.
sections.verdict: Handshake is the stronger choice for teams scaling LinkedIn outreach across multiple accounts — better safety, smarter distribution, and more cost-effective at scale. Closely is a solid option for individuals and small teams who value the built-in lead database and want a budget-friendly entry into LinkedIn automation. If multi-sender is your priority, Handshake wins clearly. If you need all-in-one prospecting with data included, Closely has appeal.

faqs.question: Is Closely cheaper than Handshake?
faqs.answer: Only for a single account ($59/mo vs $69/mo). For 5+ accounts, Handshake is cheaper — $199/mo for 5 senders vs $295/mo on Closely. Plus, Handshake includes unlimited team seats, while Closely charges per user for team access.

faqs.question: Does Closely have multi-sender rotation?
faqs.answer: No. Each LinkedIn account on Closely runs independently with its own campaigns and inbox. There's no built-in rotation logic to distribute outreach across accounts automatically.

faqs.question: Is Closely's Chrome extension safe to use?
faqs.answer: Chrome extensions for LinkedIn are inherently riskier than cloud-based tools because they inject scripts into LinkedIn's DOM. Closely's paid cloud-based plans are safer than the extension. Handshake's fully cloud-based approach avoids extension-related risks entirely.

faqs.question: Does Closely include residential proxies?
faqs.answer: Closely offers dedicated proxies on higher plans, but they don't specify residential vs datacenter. Handshake includes premium residential proxies on every plan, matched to each sender's geographic location — a higher safety standard.

faqs.question: Can I switch from Closely to Handshake?
faqs.answer: Yes. Connect your LinkedIn accounts to Handshake and set up your campaigns. No data migration is needed — you'll be up and running within a day. Your Closely lead database data can be exported and used for targeting in Handshake.
